    • resolve

      default JkResolveResult resolve(JkCoordinate coordinate, JkDependencySet deps, JkResolutionParameters parameters)
      Parameters:
      coordinate - The coordinate of the module to be resolved. Only used for caching purpose. Can be null
      parameters - can be null.
